'''Kuras IV''' was the fourth and outermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kuras system/Legends|Kuras system]] of the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. Kuras IV was a [[Temperature/Legends|frigid]], rocky wasteland.

*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]''
